## What changed

Describe the problem and the implemented solution.

## Evidence and behavior

- Public evidence or issue:
- Expected user impact:
- Screenshots or API examples, when relevant:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run release:check` passes
- [ ] New or changed business rules have automated tests
- [ ] Existing SQLite databases remain compatible
- [ ] No `.env`, database, log, token, private URL, or personal data is included
- [ ] New collectors have timeout, limits, and source-level failure isolation
- [ ] No login, CAPTCHA, Cookie, access-control, or platform restriction is bypassed
- [ ] Demo data is synthetic, has `isDemo=true`, and is visibly labeled

## License and product boundary

- [ ] This change fits the non-commercial Lite scope
- [ ] This change does not grant commercial, white-label, support, or redistribution rights
- [ ] Documentation and `.env.example` were updated when configuration changed

## Breaking changes

State any API, database, environment-variable, or user-interface changes. Write `None` when not applicable.
